title: Most news feeds are broken because they treat everyone the same.
body:
When you open a standard news app, you are usually looking at the same top stories as millions of other people. It assumes that because something is popular, it must be relevant to you. But your interests are specific. Your time is valuable. And you shouldn't have to sift through dozens of headlines just to find the one story that actually matters to your life or your work.

True personalization isn't about creating an echo chamber. It is about removing the noise. It is about using technology to understand what you care about and filtering out the rest. When news is tailored to the individual, you spend less time scrolling and more time actually learning.

We built Headlinne because we believe news should work for the reader, not the other way around. It is a simple shift, but it changes how you consume information entirely.
cta: If you are tired of the clutter, come see a better way to stay informed at HEADLINNE.com.
